name: DeepL
description: DeepL provides neural machine translation with best-in-class quality for over 30 languages. It supports text and document translation, custom glossaries for consistent terminology, formality control, language listing, and usage monitoring.

capabilities.name: text_translate
capabilities.description: Translate one or more text strings between languages with optional formality, glossary, and context-aware quality improvements.

capabilities.name: document_upload
capabilities.description: Upload and queue a document for translation while preserving formatting. Supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, and more.

capabilities.name: document_status_get
capabilities.description: Check the translation status of an uploaded document.

capabilities.name: document_download
capabilities.description: Download the translated document after processing is complete.

capabilities.name: languages_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the list of supported source and target languages with their language codes.

capabilities.name: glossary_create
capabilities.description: Create a custom glossary that enforces consistent translations of specific terms.

capabilities.name: glossaries_list
capabilities.description: List all glossaries and their metadata.

capabilities.name: glossary_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific glossary.

capabilities.name: glossary_entries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the entries of a specific glossary.

capabilities.name: glossary_language_pairs_list
capabilities.description: List supported language pairs for glossaries.

capabilities.name: usage_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve current API usage statistics including character counts and limits for your subscription.
